description: CompositionPrinted red U- neck kurti made of 100% cotton, has a split neckline, cap sleeves and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironEvery girl needs a kurti in her off-duty wardrobe. aurelia considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtis. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cuts and silhouettes but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with fitted jeggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Size and FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
